glosses.en: organize (an event); pass on a message
glosses.es: pasar un mensaje; organizar un evento
glosses.fr: transmettre un message; organiser un événement
glosses.it: passare un messaggio; organizzare un evento
glosses.pt: passar um recado; organizar um evento
glosses.vi: chuyển lời; tổ chức sự kiện
glosses.nl: een bericht doorgeven; een evenement organiseren
glosses.nb: gi beskjed videre; arrangere et arrangement
glosses.sv: föra vidare ett meddelande; ordna ett evenemang
glosses.ro: transmite un mesaj; organiza un eveniment
glosses.da: give en besked videre; afholde et arrangement
glosses.ja: 伝言を伝える; イベントを主催する

sentences.target: Ich kann ihr gern etwas ausrichten.

translations.de: Ich kann ihr gern etwas ausrichten.
translations.en: I can pass something on to her.
translations.fr: Je peux lui transmettre un message.
translations.vi: Tôi có thể chuyển lời cho cô ấy.
translations.nl: Ik kan haar een bericht doorgeven.
translations.hu: Át tudok neki adni egy üzenetet.
translations.hi: मैं उसे संदेश पहुँचा सकता हूँ.
translations.el: Μπορώ να της μεταφέρω ένα μήνυμα.
translations.nb: Jeg kan gi henne en beskjed.
translations.sv: Jag kan framföra ett meddelande till henne.
translations.da: Jeg kan give hende en besked.

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (1st person singular, present); selects an infinitive (ausrichten) at clause end.
3rd person singular feminine dative personal pronoun; indirect object/recipient of the verb.
Adverb indicating willingness/affect; modifies the predicate.
Indefinite pronoun functioning as the direct object (accusative) of the verb.
Separable-prefix verb in infinitive; complements the modal 'kann'. Here means ‘to relay/pass on’ (transitive), taking an accusative theme (‘etwas’) and a dative recipient (‘ihr’).

sentences.target: Wir wollen im Sommer ein Grillfest ausrichten.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈvɔlən ɪm ˈzɔmɐ aɪ̯n ˈɡʁɪlˌfɛst ˈaʊ̯sˌʁɪçtən/

translations.de: Wir wollen im Sommer ein Grillfest ausrichten.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈvɔlən ɪm ˈzɔmɐ aɪ̯n ˈɡʁɪlˌfɛst ˈaʊ̯sˌʁɪçtən/
translations.en: We want to host a barbecue in summer.
translations.es: Queremos organizar una barbacoa en verano.
translations.fr: On veut organiser un barbecue cet été.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们夏天想办个烧烤聚会。
translations.yue: 我哋夏天想搞個燒烤聚會。
translations.pt: Queremos fazer um churrasco no verão.
translations.he: אנחנו רוצים לארגן על האש בקיץ.
translations.vi: Bọn mình muốn tổ chức tiệc nướng vào mùa hè.
translations.ar: نريد إقامة حفلة شواء في الصيف.
translations.nl: We willen in de zomer een barbecue organiseren.
translations.hi: हम गर्मियों में बारबेक्यू पार्टी करना चाहते हैं.
translations.el: Θέλουμε το καλοκαίρι να οργανώσουμε μπάρμπεκιου.
translations.nb: Vi vil arrangere en grillfest i sommer.
translations.id: Kami ingin mengadakan pesta barbekyu saat musim panas.
translations.sv: Vi vill ordna en grillfest i sommar.
translations.ro: Vrem să organizăm un grătar vara asta.
translations.da: Vi vil holde en grillfest til sommer.
translations.ja: 夏にバーベキューを開きたいです。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite modal auxiliary (1st person plural, present); selects infinitive 'ausrichten'.
Preposition contracted with definite article (‘in dem’ → ‘im’); forms a temporal PP and governs dative.
Temporal noun in dative (object of ‘im’); adverbial modifier.
Indefinite article; determiner of ‘Grillfest’ (accusative neuter singular as direct object).
Neuter noun; direct object of ‘ausrichten’ (event to be organized).
Separable-prefix verb in infinitive; complement of modal 'wollen'. Here means ‘to organize/host’ an event (‘Grillfest’).

sentences.target: Mein Nachbar muss die Satellitenschüssel ausrichten.

translations.de: Mein Nachbar muss die Satellitenschüssel ausrichten.
translations.en: My neighbor has to align the satellite dish.
translations.es: Mi vecino tiene que orientar la antena parabólica.
translations.fr: Mon voisin doit régler la parabole.
translations.it: Il mio vicino deve orientare la parabola.
translations.ko: 우리 이웃이 위성 안테나 방향을 맞춰야 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我邻居得把卫星天线对准好。
translations.yue: 我鄰居要調校衛星天線嘅方向。
translations.ru: Моему соседу нужно настроить спутниковую тарелку.
translations.pt: Meu vizinho precisa ajustar a antena parabólica.
translations.he: השכן שלי צריך לכוון את צלחת הלוויין.
translations.vi: Hàng xóm của tôi phải chỉnh lại chảo vệ tinh.
translations.ar: جاري يحتاج إلى ضبط طبق القمر الصناعي.
translations.nl: Mijn buurman moet de schotelantenne afstellen.
translations.uk: Моєму сусідові треба налаштувати супутникову антену.
translations.hu: A szomszédomnak be kell állítania a parabolaantennát.
translations.hi: मेरे पड़ोसी को सैटेलाइट डिश ठीक से सेट करनी है.
translations.pl: Mój sąsiad musi ustawić antenę satelitarną.
translations.el: Ο γείτονάς μου πρέπει να ρυθμίσει το δορυφορικό πιάτο.
translations.id: Tetangga saya harus menyetel antena parabola.
translations.ro: Vecinul meu trebuie să regleze antena de satelit.
translations.cs: Můj soused musí seřídit satelitní parabolu.
translations.ja: 近所の人が衛星アンテナの向きを合わせないといけません。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying ‘Nachbar’.
Masculine noun; nominative singular subject.
Finite modal auxiliary (3rd person singular, present); selects infinitive ‘ausrichten’.
Definite article; accusative singular feminine marking the object ‘Satellitenschüssel’.
Feminine compound noun; direct object to be adjusted/aligned.
Separable-prefix verb in infinitive; complement of modal ‘muss’. Here means ‘to align/adjust’ the dish’s orientation.

sentences.target: Ich will mich nach dir ausrichten.

translations.de: Ich will mich nach dir ausrichten.
translations.en: I want to adapt to you.
translations.es: Quiero acomodarme a lo que te venga bien.
translations.pt: Quero me ajustar ao que for melhor para você.
translations.he: אני רוצה להתאים את עצמי אליך.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn theo lịch của bạn.
translations.nl: Ik wil me aan jou aanpassen.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हारे मुताबिक चलना चाहता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg vil tilpasse meg etter deg.
translations.sv: Jag vill anpassa mig efter dig.
translations.ro: Vreau să mă adaptez după tine.
translations.da: Jeg vil gerne indrette mig efter dig.
translations.ja: あなたに合わせたいです。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite modal auxiliary (1st person singular, present); selects infinitive ‘ausrichten’.
1st person singular accusative reflexive pronoun; reflexive object with ‘ausrichten’ in reflexive use.
Preposition governing dative; expresses orientation/accord (‘nach dir’).
2nd person singular dative personal pronoun; object of the preposition ‘nach’.
Separable-prefix verb in infinitive; complement of modal ‘will’. Reflexive construction ‘sich nach jdm/etw ausrichten’ meaning ‘to orient/align oneself to’.
